languages.text: "Что до клинка — по моей просьбе Себериан держит его под охраной. Артефакт подтачивает боевой дух солдат: глупцы видят в клинке причину осады. Похитить его было бы безумием, не так ли? А еще большим безумием — отыскать того, кто решился бы на подобное". {n}Лария едва заметно кивает вам в сторону заставы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Что до клинка — по моей просьбе Себериан держит его под охраной. Артефакт подтачивает боевой дух солдат: глупцы видят в клинке причину осады. Похитить его было бы безумием, не так ли? А еще большим безумием — отыскать того, кто решился бы на подобное". {n}Лария едва заметно кивает вам в сторону заставы.{/n}

languages.text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Что до клинка — по моей просьбе Себериан держит его под охраной. Артефакт подтачивает боевой дух солдат: глупцы видят в клинке причину осады. Похитить его было бы безумием, не так ли? А еще большим безумием — отыскать того, кто решился бы на подобное". {n}Лария едва заметно кивает вам в сторону заставы.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

"As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

"As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

languages.text: “至于那把剑，应我的要求，塞贝里安派人去看管它了。那件造物正在消磨士兵的士气，有些蠢货把围城的原因归咎于它。偷走它简直是愚不可及，不是吗？而去物色一个有胆子偷它的人，那更是蠢上加蠢。”{n}菈丽雅说着，几不可见地朝前哨那边点了点头。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “至于那把剑，应我的要求，塞贝里安派人去看管它了。那件造物正在消磨士兵的士气，有些蠢货把围城的原因归咎于它。偷走它简直是愚不可及，不是吗？而去物色一个有胆子偷它的人，那更是蠢上加蠢。”{n}菈丽雅说着，几不可见地朝前哨那边点了点头。{/n}

languages.text: « Quant à la lame... À ma demande expresse, Seberian l'a placée sous bonne garde. L'artefact sape le moral de nos soldats, car certains y voient la raison du siège dont nous faisons l'objet. Autant dire que ce serait pure folie de la voler, vous ne croyez pas ? Et plus encore de trouver un individu assez téméraire pour courir ce risque, » {n}songe Laria avec un hochement de tête imperceptible en direction de l'avant-poste.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Quant à la lame... À ma demande expresse, Seberian l'a placée sous bonne garde. L'artefact sape le moral de nos soldats, car certains y voient la raison du siège dont nous faisons l'objet. Autant dire que ce serait pure folie de la voler, vous ne croyez pas ? Et plus encore de trouver un individu assez téméraire pour courir ce risque, » {n}songe Laria avec un hochement de tête imperceptible en direction de l'avant-poste.{/n}

languages.text: "Bıçağa gelince... Seberian, benim isteğim üzerine onu muhafaza altında tutuyor. O eser, askerlerimizin moralini yıpratıyor. Bazı aptallar kılıcı bizzat kuşatmanın sebebi olarak görüyor. Onu çalmak katıksız salaklık değildir de nedir? Ayrıca onu çalacak kadar gözü kara birini bulmak daha da büyük bir salaklık..." {n}Laria, bunları anlatırken karakola doğru başıyla belli belirsiz bir harekette bulunuyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Bıçağa gelince... Seberian, benim isteğim üzerine onu muhafaza altında tutuyor. O eser, askerlerimizin moralini yıpratıyor. Bazı aptallar kılıcı bizzat kuşatmanın sebebi olarak görüyor. Onu çalmak katıksız salaklık değildir de nedir? Ayrıca onu çalacak kadar gözü kara birini bulmak daha da büyük bir salaklık..." {n}Laria, bunları anlatırken karakola doğru başıyla belli belirsiz bir harekette bulunuyor.{/n}

languages.text: «En cuanto a la espada, por solicitud mía, Seberian la mantiene bien protegida. El artefacto está socavando el ánimo de nuestros soldados: algunos necios creen que es el motivo de este asedio. Robarla sería un completo disparate, ¿no cree? Y aún más encontrar a alguien lo bastante osado como para hacerlo». {n}Laria acompaña sus palabras con un movimiento de cabeza extremadamente sutil hacia el puesto avanzado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «En cuanto a la espada, por solicitud mía, Seberian la mantiene bien protegida. El artefacto está socavando el ánimo de nuestros soldados: algunos necios creen que es el motivo de este asedio. Robarla sería un completo disparate, ¿no cree? Y aún más encontrar a alguien lo bastante osado como para hacerlo». {n}Laria acompaña sus palabras con un movimiento de cabeza extremadamente sutil hacia el puesto avanzado.{/n}

languages.text: "Was die Klinge angeht — Seberian lässt sie auf meine Bitte hin bewachen. Das Artefakt untergräbt die Moral unserer Soldaten: Einige Narren halten die Klinge für den Grund der Belagerung. Es wäre Unsinn, sie zu stehlen, oder? Und jemanden zu suchen, der dreist genug ist, sie zu stehlen, wäre ein noch größerer Unsinn", {n}erklärt Laria mit einem unmerklichen Nicken Richtung Außenposten.{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Was die Klinge angeht — Seberian lässt sie auf meine Bitte hin bewachen. Das Artefakt untergräbt die Moral unserer Soldaten: Einige Narren halten die Klinge für den Grund der Belagerung. Es wäre Unsinn, sie zu stehlen, oder? Und jemanden zu suchen, der dreist genug ist, sie zu stehlen, wäre ein noch größerer Unsinn", {n}erklärt Laria mit einem unmerklichen Nicken Richtung Außenposten.{/n}

languages.text: 「刀については、私の依頼でセベリアンが警備しています。この神器は兵士たちの士気を蝕んでいます。この刀が包囲の理由だと考える愚かな兵士もいます。それを盗むのは愚かな行為でしょう。そしてそれを盗むような大胆な人物を見つけるのは、さらに愚かな行為です」{n}ラリアは、砦に向かってわずかに首を傾げながら言います。{/n}
languages.original_text: "As for the blade — at my request, Seberian is keeping it under guard. The artefact is eroding our soldiers' morale: some fools see the blade as the reason for the siege. Stealing it would be pure folly, would it not? And finding someone brazen enough to steal it would be an even greater folly," {n}Laria says, with a barely-there nod toward the outpost.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「刀については、私の依頼でセベリアンが警備しています。この神器は兵士たちの士気を蝕んでいます。この刀が包囲の理由だと考える愚かな兵士もいます。それを盗むのは愚かな行為でしょう。そしてそれを盗むような大胆な人物を見つけるのは、さらに愚かな行為です」{n}ラリアは、砦に向かってわずかに首を傾げながら言います。{/n}
